raw_consumer_statement: So last week I checked my Best Buy account to see if an item was still eligible for a return. I noticed a purchase made on my account that I had not made. Checked my citi Best Buy card and the charge was present there as well. Called citi 3 separate time and each time Im told that not fraud case was submitted and that theyd do it that time. The receipt from the transaction is linked to my account so I was able to deduce that it was made not with physical card but by customer lookup which typically requires photo ID. The charges were for the amount XXXX made on XX/XX/year>. This purchase was made in another state. It seems simple to me but the company is not acting in good faith
